programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: The true saga of Anna Nicole Smith, whose youthful optimistic dreams of fame and fortune turn darkly tragic.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea with two bullets in his back, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his violent past. Racing to unlock the secret of his own identity, he discovers the deadly truth: he's an elite government agent. To the government, Jason Bourne isn't just their property: he's a malfunctioning $30 million weapon. Lethally trained, built to disappear, he's an agent on the run who has to be taken out. Now, the government's top operative has become its No.1 target.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Will Graham is an expert investigator who quit the Bureau after almost losing his life in the process of capturing the elusive Dr Hannibal Lecter. Years later, after a series of particularly grisly murders, Graham reluctantly agrees to come out of retirement and assist in a mysterious case. But he soon realises that the best way to catch this killer, known as the Tooth Fairy, is to find a way to get inside the killer's mind.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal 'The Cannibal' Lecter comes out of hiding to draw FBI agent Clarice Starling into a new high-stakes battle that will test her strength, cunning, and loyalty.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It's vast, untamed and home to some of the toughest places to reach. For the truckers who travel this harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B: the hard way.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For the past several decades, two months out of every year, a truly historic event occurs. Truckers in the world's most dangerous tundras carry vital equipment to remote outposts located hundreds of miles north of civilisation and all the roads are temporarily created by frozen bodies of water. The mission is to transport thousands of loads before the road literally disappears into the sea. Like their trailblazing forefathers, these truckers continue to carry on the lone wolf entrepreneurial spirit that built America, taking huge risks in the hopes of receiving huge rewards. Continuing this groundbreaking series, our truckers will once again embark on a race against the elements, against time and against each other. The series will continue to examine this time honoured profession that dates back almost a century, often through generations of families.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As gators hide deeper in the swamp, the hunters launch into full pursuit; Ronnie and Timmy chase a legendary gator that's been on the run for years.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It's vast, untamed and home to some of the toughest places to reach. For the truckers who travel this harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B: the hard way.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: In Phoenix, Rick checks Americana, Chum spots mid-century furniture, and Corey digs into boxing memorabilia.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The team are back for another season of heated auction battles and great finds. Dan and Laura Dotson take over for the second half of the season in their usual hyper-energetic style that viewers have gotten accustomed to since the inception of the show. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start, Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager, if unprepared, pupil, while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. Rene Nezhoda hits the ground running, nailing a huge vintage video game locker and showing that he's still a major player. Ivy Calhoun keeps grinding, buying locker after locker, working economies of scale to his advantage. Mary Padian is as feisty as ever, holding her own against the competition. Rounding out the bidders is long-time fan favourite Kenny Crossley. This time, Kenny brings his unique, hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right, catching the others off guard and putting on a show for the audience. Simply put, Kenny is magic. In this episode, Mary bumps into some vintage art, and Ivy adds to his stamp collection. Then, Kenny faces his fears, yet again.

programme.desc: When Sal's Pizza burns down and the fire marshal assumes that the owner is the prime suspect, Jake does everything in his power to prove him wrong, even if it means stepping out of his jurisdiction.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Jeremy Birch takes on a salvage to raise a 40-foot vessel with a concrete hull. But it's been in the Fraser River for a month, collecting silt and mud, adding 30 tons to its deadweight. Glen Skelton races to fit the storm gate to a Jersey harbour. The repaired gate weighs more than two semi-trucks, and he has only inches to play with. To add to the pressure, he must beat an incoming weather front that threatens the harbours million-dollar yachts. John Ward is called to Louisiana to salvage a nine-ton yacht beached after recent hurricanes blew it onshore.

programme.desc: Alex Horne devours a clutch of surprising chocolate eggs as Greg Davies sets more tricky challenges for five willing comics. Plus, a tiny bobble hat.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As gator season approaches the halfway point, Troy and Pickle hunt near a haunted honey hole with a checkered past; Bruce searches for the monster threatening a local swimming hole.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the Oak Island team pushes to identify who is behind the 229-year-old mystery, a new probe drilling operation in the Garden Shaft could help finally unearth the treasure.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy wants to host a Thanksgiving dinner for the entire precinct, but it turns into a holiday disaster when Holt and Jake have to leave to go catch a perp.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Chris Ward sets out with Josh Moreira and Ward's younger brother to salvage a light aircraft that's sitting on the seabed. A world away in British Colombia, Canada, in the depths of winter Jeremy Birch braves the arctic conditions to salvage two vessels that have fallen prey to the crushing ice conditions.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Midway through gator season, hunters aim to settle old scores; Willie chases a nasty gator called Renegade, which lives up to its name; Ronnie pulls double duty when Timmy arrives with his arm in a sling.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob and Steelo are joined by special guest Karrueche Tran where they get stuck in trashy traffic, paddle into kayak chaos and unmask mask menaces.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies and Alex Horne are back to challenge five brave comics to take on their tricky tasks. This time, involving a hook, feline and singers.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Shave And A Haircut: Two Bids
programme.desc: The team are back for another season of heated auction battles and great finds. Dan and Laura Dotson take over for the second half of the season in their usual hyper-energetic style that viewers have gotten accustomed to since the inception of the show. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start, Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager, if unprepared, pupil, while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. Rene Nezhoda hits the ground running, nailing a huge vintage video game locker and showing that he's still a major player. Ivy Calhoun keeps grinding, buying locker after locker, working economies of scale to his advantage. Mary Padian is as feisty as ever, holding her own against the competition. Rounding out the bidders is long-time fan favourite Kenny Crossley. This time, Kenny brings his unique, hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Arctic conditions continue to wreak havoc in British Colombia. Jeremy Birch of Mad Props Marine is called upon to raise a concrete hulled vessel. It's a wreck removal that not only breaks equipment- but brings Birch to breaking point. On the other side of Canada in New Brunswick, marine engineers battle in snow, ice and zero visibility to stabilise the river bed at the port of St John. At stake is nothing less than keep millions of tons of vital shipping supplies destined for Canada & North America.

Continuing this groundbreaking series, our truckers will once again embark on a race against the elements, against time and against each other. The series will continue to examine this time honoured profession that dates back almost a century, often through generations of families.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As the full moon drives gators into a feeding frenzy, Ashley makes a crucial mistake; Daniel chases a legendary 13-footer called "Triple XL"; Troy and Pickle battle a moon-crazed menace with a taste for gator.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It's vast, untamed and home to some of the toughest places to reach. For the truckers who travel this harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B: the hard way.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: It's operation seal the deal as Rick checks out fake government IDs belonging to Nazi spies.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The team are back for another season of heated auction battles and great finds. Dan and Laura Dotson take over for the second half of the season in their usual hyper-energetic style that viewers have gotten accustomed to since the inception of the show. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start, Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager, if unprepared, pupil, while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. Rene Nezhoda hits the ground running, nailing a huge vintage video game locker and showing that he's still a major player. Ivy Calhoun keeps grinding, buying locker after locker, working economies of scale to his advantage. Mary Padian is as feisty as ever, holding her own against the competition. Rounding out the bidders is long-time fan favourite Kenny Crossley. This time, Kenny brings his unique, hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right.

programme.desc: Dr Friis is not so thrilled about turning 30.

programme.title: Boys
programme.desc: Mikael discovers that Nikolaj and Emily have been keeping a secret from him and confronts Nikolaj.

programme.title: Moonlighting
programme.desc: Follows the dynamic partnership of Maddie, an ex-model, and David, a witty detective, as they run a private detective agency while navigating their relationship.

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: The missions of MI5, the UK's domestic intelligence organisation.

programme.title: Wentworth
programme.desc: With Franky in the slot, Jacs is ruling the prison and the women are living in fear. When word gets out that Franky is to be released back into the compound, Jacs plans a brutal attack. Bea challenges Jacs and pays a high price. Will discovers something about Meg that sends him on a downward spiral, pushing him dangerously close to the edge.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: When a killer murders their victim and converts the cranial cavity into a beehive Beverly secretly consults with Will. Will insists that Hannibal is both the Chesapeake Ripper and the Copycat Killer.

programme.title: Tin Star

programme.title: High Country
programme.desc: Alone in the wild, Andie faces a violent storm and eerie growls in the bush. Rescue comes, but from a source she never expected.

programme.title: High Country
programme.desc: A drug crop discovery makes Andie suspect the missing couple were killed after stumbling on it, while Helen and Kirra get into risky behaviour.

programme.title: The Postcard Bandit
programme.desc: Australia's notorious bank robber Brenden Abbott and son James face a life shaped by crime escapes and prison as James fights for his father's freedom and a real relationship.

programme.title: Swiping America
programme.desc: This sexy and true to life rom-doc dating series, follows a group of diverse singles from New York City (Ashleigh, Kesun, Kris and Reagan) on an introspective, eight-city dating app journey, as they explore personal issues around sex, relationships, love and connection. Each episode finds the group in a new American city (Asheville, NC; Miami, FL; Austin, TX; New Orleans, LA; Santa Fe, NM; Boulder, CO; Seattle, WA; and Honolulu, HI), as producers swipe through possible matches and curate blind dates for them. While forging a special friendship with each other over the course of the season, their journey culminates in Hawaii, where they hand-pick their best match from the season and ultimately decide whether their relationship can go the distance.

programme.title: New Nurses
programme.desc: A young mother has to learn to nurse her baby if she wants to avoid formula.

programme.title: New Nurses
programme.desc: Lis finds out her patient lives in an orphanage and tries to find her a home.

programme.title: Boys
programme.desc: Seb reveals some damning evidence about Robin to Nikolaj, who confronts Robin about his hidden agenda.

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: On the first day of the Defence case, Colby pokes holes in the Prosecution's theory against Alan and is buoyed by a breakthrough in the search for the mysterious 'John'.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: Marie Antoinette is pregnant at last, but her reputation is attacked when pornographic pamphlets challenging the legitimacy of her unborn child appear at Versailles. Louis locks down the chateau and demands a full-blown investigation to nail the seditious traitors.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: Louis becomes increasingly confident in his position as King as he throws himself into supporting the American War of Independence. Meanwhile, Marie Antoinette throws herself into life at the Petit Trianon where she becomes enamoured by a familiar face; Count Axel von Fersen.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: The killer's latest attack gives Gibson renewed drive and, as the net appears to be closing in, Spector makes a dramatic decision that binds his fate to Gibson.

programme.title: The Postcard Bandit
programme.desc: Australia's notorious bank robber Brenden Abbott and son James face a life shaped by crime escapes and prison as James fights for his father's freedom and a real relationship.

channel.display-name: [Optus TV feat. Foxtel] Family HD / MO7

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Adventuring out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. When his family risks everything to come find him, he must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand. Under the guidance of his teacher, Mrs Wilkinson, Billy's raw talent takes flight. When his father discovers his son's ambition, Billy must fight for his dreams and his destiny.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax is an adaptation of Dr. Seuss' classic tale of a forest creature who shares the enduring power of hope. In the walled city of Thneed-Ville, where everything is artificial and even the air is a commodity, a boy named Ted hopes to win the heart of his dream girl, Audrey. When he learns of her wish to see a real tree, Ted seeks out the Once-ler, a ruined old businessman outside of town in a stark wasteland. Upon hearing of how the hermit gave into his greed for profits and devastated the land over the protests of the Lorax, Ted is inspired to undo the disaster. However, the greedy Mayor of Thneed-Ville, Aloysius O'Hare, has made his fortune exploiting the environmental collapse and is determined to stop the boy from undermining his business.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog. But when Sherman takes the WABAC out for a joyride to impress his friend Penny, they accidentally rip a hole in the universe, wreaking havoc on the most important events in world history. Before they forever alter the past, present and future, Mr. Peabody must come to their rescue, ultimately facing the most daunting challenge of any era: figuring out how to be a parent. Together, the time traveling trio will make their mark on history.

programme.title: The Land Before Time
programme.desc: Join Littlefoot, Cera, Spike, Ducky and Petrie on their first journey together to find the lush, legendary Great Valley. Along the way, the prehistoric pals overcome many challenges and learn the value of teamwork and friendship.

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: The Man in the Yellow Hat looks after George, the inquisitive little monkey with an insatiable taste for adventure, who sets off in a brand new tale, where his spunky and fun-loving nature endears him to new friends and launches him on a series of (mis)adventures. Based on the classic stories by Margret and H. A. Rey, the film features an old-fashioned two-dimensional animation that echoes the simple colours and shapes of the books.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: When a case of mistaken identity leads both humans and animals to believe there is a werewolf on the prowl, former hunter Shaw tries to reopen open season.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs, and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Growing up the best of friends, they share the strong bond of free-spirited youth and good-natured rivalry. But the truth will ultimately set them at odds, as one becomes the ruler of the most powerful empire on earth, the other the chosen leader of his people. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: From the Academy Award nominated film How to Train Your Dragon comes the next chapter in the epic trilogy. When Hiccup and Toothless discover a secret ice cave filled with hundreds of wild dragons and a mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the centre of an epic battle to save the future of men and dragons!

programme.title: The Colours Within
programme.desc: A girl who can see colours in people's hearts joins a band with two other people.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Woody Woodpecker
programme.desc: The hyperactive red-headed bird enters a turf war with a big city lawyer wanting to tear down his home in an effort to build a house to flip.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A high velocity comedy about an underdog snail who kicks into overdrive when he miraculously attains the power of super-speed. But after making fast friends with a crew of streetwise, tricked-out es-car-goes, Turbo learns that no one succeeds on their own. So he puts his heart and shell on the line to help his pals achieve their dreams, before Turbo-charging his own impossible dream: winning the Indy 500.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: Once upon a time, in the far away kingdom of Dor, lived a brave and virtuous mouse with comically oversized ears who dreamt of becoming a knight. Banished from his home for having such lofty ambitions, Despereaux sets off on an amazing adventure with his good-hearted rat friend Roscuro, who leads him, at long last, on a very noble quest to rescue an endangered princess and save an entire kingdom from darkness. Based on the heart-warming, bestselling children's book and featuring the voice talents of an all-star cast, this film is a magical, modern fairytale that's destined to win the hearts of young and old alike.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: When California girl Susan Murphy is clobbered by space gunk on her wedding day, she mysteriously grows to 49-feet-11-inches tall. The military puts her into a secret government compound, renamed Ginormica and hold her captive along with a ragtag group of Monsters: the brilliant but insect-headed Dr Cockroach, Ph.D.; the macho half-ape, half-fish, The Missing Link; the gelatinous and indestructible B.O.B.; and the 350-foot grub, Insectosaurus. But when a wild and dangerous alien robot lands on Earth, The President enlists this motley crew to save the world from imminent destruction.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the world's first family road trip. When their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home. As if patriarch Grug didn't already have enough to handle, it goes from bad to worse when they encounter an imaginative nomad named Guy. With Guy's help the Croods conquer their fear of the outside world and discover that they have exactly what it takes to survive - each other.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Join the fun when the Little family adopts an adorably spunky boy named Stuart, who looks a lot like a mouse. Mr and Mrs Little fall in love with Stuart right away, but their older son, George, isn't so sure. As Stuart tries to win over his new brother with hilarious feats of courage and daring, the family's cat, Snowbell, gets involved with a gang of shady felines who devise a dastardly plan to get Stuart out of the house - permanently.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family voyage on a luxury monster cruise ship so he can take a summer vacation from providing everyone else's vacation at the hotel, and the rest of Drac's Pack cannot resist tagging along. The monsters are all having a great time, indulging in all of the shipboard fun the cruise has to offer, from monster volleyball to colossus sized buffets and exotic excursions, but then the unexpected happens as Drac falls for the intriguing-yet-dangerous captain of the ship. Balancing family, friends, and a budding romance might just be too much, even for the most powerful vampire.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: Gabby's prized dollhouse falls into the hands of eccentric cat lady Vera, sending her on a real-world quest to reunite the Gabby Cats before time runs out.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The world's greatest rescue squad are trapped in space while an evil enemy works overtime.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: Part husky, part wolf, Balto doesn't know where he belongs. He's an outcast in Alaska, except to his true friends - Boris, the Russian snow goose, polar bear cubs Muk and Luk, and the beautiful husky, Jenna. Even though he's different, all of Balto's friends recognise what he still can't see himself: his noble spirit. One day, a serious diphtheria epidemic spreads fast among the children of Nome. When a fierce blizzard closes off all routes of transport, there's no way to obtain lifesaving medicine - unless a team of sled dogs can race 965km through the blinding Arctic storm and bring back anti-toxin. But when the dogs get lost in the frozen wilderness, only Balto can rescue the team and save the children.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives. Welcome to the most astonishing chapter of one of the most beloved animated franchises in film history: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World. Now chief and ruler of Berk alongside Astrid, Hiccup has created a gloriously chaotic dragon utopia. When the sudden appearance of a female Light Fury coincides with the darkest threat their village has ever faced, Hiccup and Toothless must leave the only home they've known and journey to a hidden world thought only to exist in myth. As their true destines are revealed, dragon and rider will fight together - to the very ends of the Earth - to protect everything they've grown to treasure.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, and Verne and his woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat. Enter RJ, an opportunistic raccoon who explains that the world beyond the hedge is 'the gateway to the good life' where peculiar creatures called humans live to eat, rather than eat to live. "For humans," RJ proclaims, "enough is never enough."

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vegie-eating boys are back. Three veggies serve as 'cabin boys' at a pirate-themed dinner theatre, where they long to move from table service to the stage show, but their incompetence, laziness and cowardice get in the way. But when a princess drags them into the 17th century to rescue her brother, who's been kidnapped by a nefarious pirate with designs on her kingdom, they have to overcome their issues and become heroes.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, his adorable girls, and the mischievous Minions are back with a cast of unforgettable new characters in the blockbuster sequel to the worldwide phenomenon. Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world. Partnered with secret agent Lucy Wilde, Gru, along with the wildly unpredictable Minions, must figure out how to keep his cover while also keeping up with his duties as a father. Get ready for more Minion madness.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: Major Payne
programme.desc: When peace breaks out in America, killing machine Major Benson Winifred Payne, United States Marine Corps Special Forces, is given his marching orders: to the unemployment line. Unable to cope with civilian life, Payne is thrust back into the military regiment as commander of the Madison Academy Junior ROTC.

programme.title: Open Season 2
programme.desc: Boog and Elliot are back for more crazy adventures. After falling head over hooves in love with Giselle, Elliot's road to the altar takes a slight detour when Mr. Weenie is kidnapped by a group of pampered pets determined to return him to his owners. Boog, Elliot, McSquizzy, Buddy and the rest of the woodland creatures launch a full-scale rescue mission for their sausage-shaped friend and soon find themselves in enemy camp: the world of the pets. Led by a toy poodle named Fifi, the pets do not plan to let Mr. Weenie go without a fight. Can a toy poodle REALLY bring down a 900-pound grizzly bear? Will Elliot ever marry Giselle?

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: A clueless domesticated bear and an outcast deer try to survive trigger-happy hunters and hostile forest critters.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Before he met the ogre Shrek, Puss in Boots (voice of Antonio Banderas) had a complicated life in which he was smeared with the blame of a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against Puss' wishes by Humpty Dumpty (Zach Galifianakis), who was captured while trying to escape - thanks to Puss leaving him to his fate in anger. The two lifelong friends break up and it isn't until they re-unite that they trust each other again.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: An elite society of Japanese warriors has prophesised that one day a blonde-haired fair-skinned child will come to their village and lead them as a fighter of a remarkable skill and bravery. So when an American child who fell overboard on an ocean liner washes up on their shores, they adopt him as one of their own and patiently instruct him in the ways of a ninja. Trouble is, the child, whom they name Haru, grows up to be fat, clumsy, not especially bright, and startlingly inept as a warrior. Undaunted, Haru struggles on with his ninja training, and when Alison, a beautiful woman from America, requests a ninja fighter to return with her to the states and protect her from her criminal-minded boyfriend and his Yakuza associates, Haru eagerly accepts the assignment. Haru's minders see trouble brewing, so they secretly send along a fellow ninja, Gobei, to watch his back, although this hardly prevents Haru from posing a deadly menace to inanimate objects everywhere.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Morty and other zoo animals find a way to escape from Madagascar when the penguins reassemble a wrecked airplane. The precariously repaired craft stays airborne just long enough to make it to the African continent. There the New Yorkers encounter members of their own species for the first time. Africa proves to be a wild place, but Alex and company wonder if it is better than their Central Park home.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is coping with some major life changes. His owner is now married and has a toddler, Liam. Max is so worried about protecting the boy that he develops a nervous tic. On a family trip to a farm, Max and mutt Duke encounter canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a terrifying turkey, all of which only elevates Max's anxiety. Luckily, Max gets some guidance from veteran farm dog Rooster, who pushes Max to ditch his neuroses, find his inner alpha and give Liam a little more freedom.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch" based on Dr. Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Combat Wombat
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Sanctuary City lives Maggie Diggins, a cantankerous wombat left at odds with society who, after a tragic digging accident resulted in the disappearance of her husband, now lives out a solitary existence in her cozy burrow. On a midnight chocolate run to the convenience store, she unwittingly stops an altercation between a gang of Drop Bears and a young sugar glider with a one-two punch from her powerful rump. The superhero obsessed sugar glider, named Sweetie, marvels over Maggie's bootylicious crime fighting antics and she is thrust into the limelight as township's newest superhero. Spurred on by Sweetie, Maggie takes on a new alias as "Combat Wombat", a friendly, yet fierce female crime fighter, who immediately wins over the city's people. However, not everyone is happy to welcome this newcomer and she soon finds herself ruffling the feathers of previous town superhero, Flightless Feather; a capable, yet conceited cassowary.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: A reject rocker takes a lowly teaching job at an uptight school. His hijinks galvanise the kids to create a killer band that can solve his money problems and put him back in the spotlight.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Adventuring out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. When his family risks everything to come find him, he must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Travel back to the stone-age in this big-budget treatment of the world's favourite prehistoric family! Fred Flintstone, a put-upon blue-collar worker struggling to squeak by, with the help of his best buddy Barney and his wife Wilma. After an aptitude test mix up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Slate & Company Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. But there's trouble brewing in Bedrock: An evil executive and his sinister secretary are now plotting to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme!

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer and habitual liar discovers that he is unable to tell a lie or withhold the truth about anything for 24 hours after his son makes a birthday wish that comes true.

programme.title: You Don't Mess with the Zohan
programme.desc: The Zohan is the finest counterterrorist agent the Israeli army has. That is, until he fakes his death and travels to Manhattan to live his dream as a hairdresser. Now this skilled fighting machine who used to clip bad guys is out to prove he can make the cut as a top stylist. All goes silky smooth until his cover is blown when he's recognised by a Palestinian cab driver. Now, the Zohan must fight to live a peaceful new life in New York in this razor-sharp action-packed comedy.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: After his dream of stardom on the hockey ice melts, Happy Gilmore discovers he has a gift that could bring him glory on the greens. Trouble is, with his hot head and hard-hitting drives, Happy doesn't just play golf, he destroys it. With the help of a retired golfer and hot publicist, can Happy perfect his game and tame his temper to win the tournament prize money?

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Twenty-seven-year-old Billy Madison must repeat all 12 grades of school in just 24 weeks to earn his father's respect, and prove he has what it takes to run the family's multimillion-dollar empire. Along the way, Billy falls for his third grade teacher, gets kicked out of school and must face off with his nemesis, not to mention a pesky penguin.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: Brad Taggart is a kind-hearted radio executive who wants to be the best possible stepfather to his wife's two children. When her freewheeling ex-husband Dusty breezes back into town, Brad's feeling of insecurity quickly develops into an inferiority complex. As Dusty demonstrates his flair for athletics, home repair and bad-boy charisma, Taggart finds himself in a no-holds-barred battle to one-up his rival and win the approval of his family.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Ditched by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt has had to raise himself. Now grown up and working as a janitor Joe sets out to find the parents who abandoned him. Along the way, he befriends a high school janitor, an alligator trainer, the beautiful but untouchable Brandy, and Robby, Joe's rival for her attention. Eventually Joe makes his way to Los Angeles, where a shock-jock brings him on his radio show to make fun of him. But as Joe recounts his story, listeners are captivated, and an entire city starts to tune in daily to hear the adventures of Joe Dirt. Soon audiences worldwide join to help this unlikely hero unearth the mystery of his family's disappearance, with startling results.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. What ensues is comic mayhem wherein the process of uncovering lies only begets more lies.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world! After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that they've lost their harmony for good. With one chance left at redeeming their legacy, they must they must face off against the toughest competition on the planet: German supergroup Das Sound Machine and fight for their right to win at the World Championships of A Cappella. It will take the power of sisterhood to find their voice and see what it takes to be the world's top pitches!

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: After his dream of stardom on the hockey ice melts, Happy Gilmore discovers he has a gift that could bring him glory on the greens. Trouble is, with his hot head and hard-hitting drives, Happy doesn't just play golf, he destroys it. With the help of a retired golfer and hot publicist, can Happy perfect his game and tame his temper to win the tournament prize money?

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Twenty-seven-year-old Billy Madison must repeat all 12 grades of school in just 24 weeks to earn his father's respect, and prove he has what it takes to run the family's multimillion-dollar empire. Along the way, Billy falls for his third grade teacher, gets kicked out of school and must face off with his nemesis, not to mention a pesky penguin.

programme.desc: Brad Taggart is a kind-hearted radio executive who wants to be the best possible stepfather to his wife's two children. When her freewheeling ex-husband Dusty breezes back into town, Brad's feeling of insecurity quickly develops into an inferiority complex. As Dusty demonstrates his flair for athletics, home repair and bad-boy charisma, Taggart finds himself in a no-holds-barred battle to one-up his rival and win the approval of his family.

programme.desc: Ditched by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt has had to raise himself. Now grown up and working as a janitor Joe sets out to find the parents who abandoned him. Soon audiences worldwide join to help this unlikely hero unearth the mystery of his family's disappearance, with startling results.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. What ensues is comic mayhem wherein the process of uncovering lies only begets more lies.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world! After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that they've lost their harmony for good. With one chance left at redeeming their legacy, they must they must face off against the toughest competition on the planet: German supergroup Das Sound Machine and fight for their right to win at the World Championships of A Cappella. It will take the power of sisterhood to find their voice and see what it takes to be the world's top pitches!

programme.title: Ride Along
programme.desc: When a fast-talking guy joins his girlfriend's brother-a hot-tempered cop-to patrol the streets of Atlanta, he gets entangled in the officer's latest case. Now, in order to prove that he deserves his future bride, he must survive the most insane 24 hours of his life. For the past two years, high-school security guard Ben has been trying to show decorated APD detective James that he's more than just a video-game junkie who's unworthy of James' sister, Angela. When Ben finally gets accepted into the academy, he thinks he's earned the seasoned policeman's respect and asks for his blessing to marry Angela. Knowing that a ride along will demonstrate if Ben has what it takes to take care of his sister, James invites him on a shift designed to scare the hell out of the trainee. But when the wild night leads them to the most notorious criminal in the city, James will find that his new partner's rapid-fire mouth is just as dangerous as the bullets speeding at it.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise, spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached, until he meets Lucy. He and Lucy hit it off from the get-go, but the next day she acts like she doesn't know him. Has his karma come around to kick him in the butt, or what? Actually, Lucy has short-term memory loss, so every night all memory of her day is erased, but a man in love will go to any lengths to win over the girl of his dreams, and if that means having to find imaginative ways of doing it over again every day, then Henry's up for the challenge.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Bill Murray is at his wry, wisecracking best in this riotous romantic comedy about a weatherman caught in a personal time warp on the worst day of his life. Teamed with a relentlessly cheerful producer and a smart-aleck cameraman, TV weatherman Phil Connors is sent to Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent. Suddenly, everyone on both sides of the law wants them dead, and their only hope is to trust each other.

programme.title: Dazed and Confused
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed cult favourite explores the last day of school - and one wild night - in the lives of high school students in 1976. Complete with bongs and bell bottoms, macrame and mood rings, and featuring classic rock music. 1976 was a time they'd never forget if only they could remember.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: In this outrageous slapstick comedy funny-men Rob Schneider, David Spade and Jon Heder star as three older guys with little sporting ability, who spent a lot of time on the bench when they were kids. Now they have a second chance to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams when they take on a squad of Little League baseball bullies. Striking a blow for the athletically-challenged they soon become unlikely heroes to the bullied, clumsy and awkward and an inspiration to benchwarmers everywhere.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: Chip Douglas, a cable installer raised on television sitcoms, he wants life to look just like My Three Sons. And when he meets single guy Steven Kovacs, he sees his chance for some serious male bonding. But Chip's idea of friendship - which includes physical assault, a game of 'Porno Password' and a medieval joust - may be hazardous to Steven's health. In Chip's own immortal words, "I can be your best friend or your worst enemy."

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Bill Murray is at his wry, wisecracking best in this riotous romantic comedy about a weatherman caught in a personal time warp on the worst day of his life. Teamed with a relentlessly cheerful producer and a smart-aleck cameraman, TV weatherman Phil Connors is sent to Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities.

Suddenly, everyone on both sides of the law wants them dead, and their only hope is to trust each other.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, and gets detained. He faces old enemies, makes new friends in detention, and teaches his version of Australian mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: A pair of energy drink salesmen are forced into the role of big brothers to fulfil a community service obligation. But what at first seems like an easy way to do their time quickly becomes a pint-sized hassle when the kids they are assigned to mentor become a bigger challenge than they expected.

programme.title: Dazed and Confused
programme.desc: This critically acclaimed cult favourite explores the last day of school - and one wild night - in the lives of high school students in 1976. Complete with bongs and bell bottoms, macrame and mood rings, and featuring classic rock music. 1976 was a time they'd never forget if only they could remember.

Striking a blow for the athletically-challenged they soon become unlikely heroes to the bullied, clumsy and awkward and an inspiration to benchwarmers everywhere.

programme.title: The Cable Guy

In Chip's own immortal words, "I can be your best friend or your worst enemy."

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, this group of awesome nerds will come together to make some music, and some questionable decisions, one last time.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: The title says it all when Johnny Knoxville and his merry band of stuntsters bring their extreme routine to the big screen, which includes guest spots from Spike Jonze and Tony Hawk. Those mystified by the non-stop barrage of self-destructive sight-gags need look no further than the skate culture from which Knoxville and his post-pubescent posse emerged: slam sections - footage of guys hitting concrete and living to tell the tale - are a skateboard video standard. Just remember: it's funny because it's true.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: Well, there goes the neighbourhood - in a pine box. When hit man Jimmy "The Tulip" Tudeski moves into a comfy suburb, everyone's suddenly in danger of pushing up daisies. And it's not all Jimmy's doing either. Jonathan Lynn directs and a talented ensemble cast packs heat in this manic comedy about life, love and plenty of ammo. Bruce Willis plays Jimmy, whose arrival sparks a chain reaction in which just about everybody wants to clip somebody else. Matthew Perry plays a hapless dentist who finds a way to get on the Tulip's good and bad sides.

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: In Bob's togetherness road trip plan (which is a ruse to keep him from losing his job), everything that can go wrong does, and his attempts to unite his family threatens to tear them further apart.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. Matthew Perry plays a hapless dentist who finds a way to get on the Tulip's good and bad sides.

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: In Bob's togetherness road trip plan (which is a ruse to keep him from losing his job), everything that can go wrong does, and his attempts to unite his family threatens to tear them further apart.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: Kicking & Screaming
programme.desc: Phil Weston is a mild-mannered suburban dad - who's suddenly transformed into a caffeine-fuelled sports maniac when he becomes the coach of his son's unruly soccer team. But when the championship pits Phil's underdog team against the squad coached by his own domineering dad, it's game on for the most uproarious mismatch of the season.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up on the outskirts of Orlando. There's only one glitch: she's financing her shopping sprees with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US. With only one week to hunt down the con artist before his world implodes, the real Sandy Patterson is forced to extreme measures to clear his name.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca is that girl who'd rather listen to what's coming out of her headphones than what's coming out of you. Arriving at her new college, she finds herself not right for any clique but somehow is muscled into one that she never would have picked on her own: alongside mean girls, sweet girls and weird girls whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together, in the out-loud comedy Pitch Perfect. When Beca takes this acoustic singing group out of their world of traditional arrangements and perfect harmonies into all-new mash-ups, they fight to climb their way to the top of the cutthroat world of college a cappella. This could wind up either the coolest thing they'll ever do or the most insane, and it will probably be a little of both.

programme.title: Balls of Fury
programme.desc: Watch the balls fly in this hilarious action-packed comedy. When former professional table tennis phenomenon Randy Daytona is recruited by FBI agent Rodriguez for a mission in the unsanctioned, underground and utterly unhinged world of extreme table tennis, he's determined to bounce back to his former glory and smoke out his father's killer, the arch-fiend Feng. But with danger coming at him from every angle, will Randy be able to keep his eye on the balls?

programme.title: Paul
programme.desc: Two geeks go on a pilgrimage which takes them to America's UFO heartland. While there, they accidentally meet an alien who brings them on an insane road trip that alters their universe forever. For the past 60 years, an alien named Paul has been hanging out at a top-secret military base. When he discovers he's been taken prisoner, the space-traveling smart ass decides to escape the compound and hop on the first vehicle out of town-a rented RV containing Earthlings Graeme Willy and Clive Gollings. Chased by federal agents and the fanatical father of a young woman that they accidentally kidnap, Graeme and Clive hatch a fumbling escape plan to return Paul to his mother ship. And as two nerds struggle to help, one little green man might just take his fellow outcasts from misfits to intergalactic heroes.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: One of television's most popular duos heads to the big screen in this parody of the popular 1970s series. Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops. The new partners must overcome their differences to solve an important case with help from street informant, Huggy Bear and persuasive criminal, Reese Feldman.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of today's most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer. As the victims begin to pile up and the laughs pile on, none of your favourite scary movies escape the razor-sharp satire of this outrageously funny parody.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up on the outskirts of Orlando. There's only one glitch: she's financing her shopping sprees with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US. With only one week to hunt down the con artist before his world implodes, the real Sandy Patterson is forced to extreme measures to clear his name.

programme.title: Major Payne
programme.desc: When peace breaks out in America, killing machine Major Benson Winifred Payne, United States Marine Corps Special Forces, is given his marching orders: to the unemployment line. Unable to cope with civilian life, Payne is thrust back into the military regiment as commander of the Madison Academy Junior ROTC.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent.
